title: Who is TS Baby Jayne? Influencer shares unseen photos, alleges past relationship with Chudthebuilder
summary_full: TS Baby Jayne, a transgender tattoo artist and content creator, has gone viral after claiming she dated streamer Chudthebuilder in 2025. In a YouTube video, she shared photos and alleged messages to support her account. The evidence has not been independently verified, and Chudthebuilder has not publicly responded, leaving the claims the subject of intense online debate.
